productDisplayName: Fila Men Skylite New Black Shoes
description: Designed for those who demand more speed and durability, the fila Skylite is a shoe that offers all the dependibility that you need. UpperAbrasion resistant and heavily meshed upper for absolute breathabilityfila breathable membrane to keep moisture at baySynthetic overlays strategically placed for added shoe structureCentral lacing system for a snug, customised FitHeavily padded collar and plush tongue for snug fitTwill tape at the heel for added structureMidsoleSoft, cushioned footbed for all-day in-step comfortfull length phylon midsole compression for absolute impact protection and the maintain stabilityOutsoleMade of durable rubber to withstand excessive usageFlex grooves on the forefoot region for added flexibility and tractionMulti-directional lugs and grooves for absolute grip on various terrainImpact guidance line for great traction, with a scooped heel for cushioning to the back footShoe careDo not machine washWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustStore away from direct sunlight
